// FinkWatch | Session 1 | Build 1 | 2026-04-05 18:30 ET | Remove splash screen
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip as RTooltip, ReferenceLine, ResponsiveContainer } from "recharts";

const K = { pos: "ofi-p-v5", acct: "ofi-a-v5", hist: "ofi-h-v5", view: "ofi-vw-v2", tab: "ofi-tab-v1" };
const gid = () => Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 6);
const fmt$ = (n) => { const abs = Math.abs(Math.round(n)); const s = abs.toLocaleString(); return n < 0 ? `-$${s}` : `$${s}`; };

const AVATAR = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";


function daysTo(ds) { if (!ds) return 999; const n = new Date(); n.setHours(0,0,0,0); const t = new Date(ds+"T16:00:00"); t.setHours(0,0,0,0); return Math.ceil((t-n)/864e5); }
function fDate(ds) { if (!ds) return "—"; return new Date(ds+"T12:00:00").toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric"}); }
function fDateFull(ds) { if (!ds) return "—"; return new Date(ds+"T12:00:00").toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric",year:"numeric"}); }

const STATUS_INFO = {
  "EXPIRED": "This position has passed its expiration date.",
  "ITM": "In The Money — for puts: stock is BELOW your short strike. For calls: stock is ABOVE your short strike. You're at risk of assignment. Act fast on any roll alert.",
  "EXP WEEK": "Expiration is THIS WEEK. Check Jim Fink's alerts every single day. Execute any roll alert immediately.",
  "DANGER": "Less than 21 days to expiration. Jim is actively monitoring. Check his alerts daily, especially the OFI website.",
  "TIGHT": "Stock is within 3% of your short strike. Not urgent yet, but watch more closely than usual.",
  "OK": "Looking good. Stock is comfortably above your short strike with time on your side. No action needed.",
};

function statusOf(days, cp) {
  if (days <= 0) return { l: "EXPIRED", c: "#94a3b8", bg: "#f1f5f9", i: "⏰" };
  if (cp !== null && cp < 0) return { l: "ITM", c: "#b45309", bg: "#fef3c7", i: "⚠️" };
  if (days <= 7) return { l: "EXP WEEK", c: "#dc2626", bg: "#fee2e2", i: "🚨" };
  if (days <= 21) return { l: "DANGER", c: "#ea580c", bg: "#ffedd5", i: "⚠️" };
  if (cp !== null && cp < 3) return { l: "TIGHT", c: "#ea580c", bg: "#fff7ed", i: "👀" };
  return { l: "OK", c: "#16a34a", bg: "#dcfce7", i: "✅" };
}


function TypePill({ type }) {
  const isCall = type === "call";
  return <span style={{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 6px",borderRadius:"4px",
    background:isCall?"#ede9fe":"#dcfce7",color:isCall?"#7c3aed":T.green,
    fontFamily:T.mono,letterSpacing:"0.3px"}}>
    {isCall ? "CALL" : "PUT"}
  </span>;
}

function gcal(title, desc, ds) {
  if (!ds) return "#";
  const s = new Date(ds+"T08:00:00"), e = new Date(ds+"T08:30:00");
  const f = d => d.toISOString().replace(/[-:]/g,"").replace(/\.\d{3}/,"");
  const u = new URL("https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render");
  u.searchParams.set("action","TEMPLATE"); u.searchParams.set("text",title);
  u.searchParams.set("details",desc+"\n\n---\nCreated by: FinkWatch\nPurpose: Options position monitoring\nStrategy: Jim Fink put credit spreads");
  u.searchParams.set("dates",`${f(s)}/${f(e)}`); return u.toString();
}

function wk3b(ds) { if (!ds) return ""; const d = new Date(ds+"T12:00:00"); d.setDate(d.getDate()-21); return d.toISOString().split("T")[0]; }
function expMon(ds) { if (!ds) return ""; const d = new Date(ds+"T12:00:00"); const dy = d.getDay(); d.setDate(d.getDate()-(dy===0?-1:dy===1?0:dy-1)); return d.toISOString().split("T")[0]; }

function calc(pos, acct) {
  const w = Math.abs(pos.shortStrike-pos.longStrike), ct = pos.contracts||1;
  const margin = w*100*ct, maxWin = (pos.credit||0)*100*ct, maxLoss = margin-maxWin;
  const riskPct = acct>0?(maxLoss/acct*100):0, returnPct = maxLoss>0?(maxWin/maxLoss*100):0;
  const isCall = pos.type === "call";
  const px = pos.lastPrice||null;
  // puts: cushion = stock - shortStrike (positive = safe, stock above strike)
  // calls: cushion = shortStrike - stock (positive = safe, stock below strike)
  const cush = px ? (isCall ? pos.shortStrike-px : px-pos.shortStrike) : null;
  const cushPct = px ? (cush/px*100) : null;
  const days = daysTo(pos.expiration), st = statusOf(days, cushPct);
  return { w, ct, margin, maxWin, maxLoss, riskPct, returnPct, px, cush, cushPct, days, st, isCall };
}

function parseFidelityCSV(text) {
  // Handles the tab-separated Fidelity portfolio export format
  // e.g. "-AJG260717P230  AJG JUL 17 2026 $230 PUT  -1  ..."
  const results = [];
  const legs = [];
  const symRe = /[-\s]?([A-Z]{1,5})(\d{2})(\d{2})(\d{2})(P|C)(\d+)/;
  for (const line of text.split("\n")) {
    const cols = line.split("\t").map(s=>s.trim());
    if (cols.length < 6) continue;
    const symCol = cols[2] || cols[1] || "";
    const m = symCol.match(symRe);
    if (!m) continue;
    const [,ticker,yy,mm,dd,type,strikeStr] = m;
    const qty = parseInt(cols[4]);
    const avgCost = parseFloat((cols[15]||"0").replace(/[$,]/g,"")) || null;
    if (isNaN(qty)) continue;
    legs.push({ticker, expiry:`20${yy}-${mm}-${dd}`, type:type==="C"?"call":"put",
      strike:parseInt(strikeStr), qty, avgCost});
  }
  // Group by ticker+expiry+type, pair short+long
  const groups = {};
  for (const l of legs) {
    const k = `${l.ticker}-${l.expiry}-${l.type}`;
    if (!groups[k]) groups[k] = [];
    groups[k].push(l);
  }
  for (const [,grp] of Object.entries(groups)) {
    const short = grp.find(l=>l.qty<0), long_ = grp.find(l=>l.qty>0);
    if (!short||!long_) continue;
    const credit = (short.avgCost && long_.avgCost) ? Math.round((short.avgCost - long_.avgCost)*100)/100 : null;
    const contracts = Math.abs(short.qty);
    results.push({ticker:short.ticker, shortStrike:short.strike, longStrike:long_.strike,
      expiration:short.expiry, credit, contracts, type:short.type, lastPrice:null, notes:""});
  }
  return results;
}

function parseFidelity(text) {
  const results = [], mo = {JAN:"01",FEB:"02",MAR:"03",APR:"04",MAY:"05",JUN:"06",JUL:"07",AUG:"08",SEP:"09",OCT:"10",NOV:"11",DEC:"12"};
  const optLines = [];
  for (const line of text.split("\n").map(l=>l.trim()).filter(Boolean)) {
    const m = line.match(/^([A-Z]{1,5})\s+(JAN|FEB|MAR|APR|MAY|JUN|JUL|AUG|SEP|OCT|NOV|DEC)\s+(\d{1,2})\s+(\d{4})\s+\$(\d+)\s+(PUT|CALL)/i);
    if (m) optLines.push({ticker:m[1],month:mo[m[2].toUpperCase()],day:m[3].padStart(2,"0"),year:m[4],strike:parseInt(m[5]),type:m[6].toUpperCase()});
  }
  const grouped = {};
  for (const o of optLines) { const k=`${o.ticker}-${o.year}-${o.month}-${o.day}-${o.type}`; if(!grouped[k])grouped[k]=[]; grouped[k].push(o); }
  for (const [,legs] of Object.entries(grouped)) {
    if (legs.length>=2) {
      const isCall = legs[0].type === "CALL";
      // puts: short=higher strike; calls: short=lower strike (selling the closer one)
      const sr = isCall ? legs.sort((a,b)=>a.strike-b.strike) : legs.sort((a,b)=>b.strike-a.strike);
      results.push({ticker:sr[0].ticker,shortStrike:sr[0].strike,longStrike:sr[1].strike,
        expiration:`${sr[0].year}-${sr[0].month}-${sr[0].day}`,credit:null,type:isCall?"call":"put"});
    }
  }
  return results;
}

function parseOFIEmail(text) {
  const res = [], tms=[...text.matchAll(/\((?:NYSE|NASDAQ|AMEX):\s*([A-Z]{1,5})\)/gi)], tix=[...new Set(tms.map(m=>m[1]))];
  const mm={january:"01",february:"02",march:"03",april:"04",may:"05",june:"06",july:"07",august:"08",september:"09",october:"10",november:"11",december:"12",jan:"01",feb:"02",mar:"03",apr:"04",jun:"06",jul:"07",aug:"08",sep:"09",oct:"10",nov:"11",dec:"12"};
  const sells=[...text.matchAll(/[""]?Sell to Open[""]?\s+(\w+)\s+(?:(\d+),?\s*(\d{4})\s+)?\$(\d+)\s+(Put|Call)/gi)];
  const buys=[...text.matchAll(/[""]?Buy to Open[""]?\s+(\w+)\s+(?:(\d+),?\s*(\d{4})\s+)?\$(\d+)\s+(Put|Call)/gi)];
  if (sells.length&&buys.length) {
    for (let i=0;i<sells.length;i++) { const s=sells[i],b=buys[i]; if(!b) continue;
      const isCall = s[5]?.toLowerCase()==="call";
      const ss=parseInt(s[4]),ls=parseInt(b[4]),mo=mm[s[1].toLowerCase()]; let exp="";
      if(mo){const y=s[3]||""+new Date().getFullYear();const fd=new Date(+y,+mo-1,1);let fr=new Date(fd);while(fr.getDay()!==5)fr.setDate(fr.getDate()+1);fr.setDate(fr.getDate()+14);exp=fr.toISOString().split("T")[0];}
      res.push({ticker:tix[i]||tix[0]||"???",shortStrike:ss,longStrike:ls,expiration:exp,credit:null,type:isCall?"call":"put"}); }
  }
  const osyms=[...text.matchAll(/([A-Z]{1,5})(\d{2})(\d{2})(\d{2})([PC])(\d+)/g)];
  if(!res.length&&osyms.length>=2){const g={};for(const s of osyms){const t=s[1];if(!g[t])g[t]=[];g[t].push({y:"20"+s[2],m:s[3],d:s[4],k:parseInt(s[6])});}for(const[t,legs]of Object.entries(g)){if(legs.length>=2){const sr=legs.sort((a,b)=>b.k-a.k);res.push({ticker:t,shortStrike:sr[0].k,longStrike:sr[1].k,expiration:`${sr[0].y}-${sr[0].m}-${sr[0].d}`,credit:null});}}}
  return res;
}

const T = { bg:"#e8e4dc",card:"#ffffff",border:"#d4cfc6",text:"#1f2937",sub:"#6b7280",muted:"#9ca3af",accent:"#2563eb",green:"#16a34a",red:"#dc2626",orange:"#ea580c",inpBg:"#f0ede8",inpBrd:"#ccc7bc",mono:"'IBM Plex Mono','SF Mono',monospace",sans:"'DM Sans',-apple-system,sans-serif" };
const inp = (w) => ({background:T.inpBg,border:`1px solid ${T.inpBrd}`,borderRadius:"6px",padding:"8px 10px",color:T.text,fontSize:"15px",fontFamily:T.mono,boxSizing:"border-box",width:w||"100%",outline:"none",WebkitAppearance:"none"});
const btnS = (bg,col,brd) => ({padding:"10px 18px",borderRadius:"8px",border:brd||"none",background:bg,color:col,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:600,fontFamily:T.sans,WebkitTapHighlightColor:"transparent"});
const lbl = {fontSize:"11px",color:T.sub,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.8px",display:"block",marginBottom:"3px",fontWeight:600};
const metaLbl = {fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.8px",marginBottom:"2px",fontWeight:600};


// ── Badge ──
function Badge({ s }) {
  const [show, setShow] = useState(false);
  return <span style={{position:"relative",display:"inline-block"}}>
    <span onClick={() => setShow(!show)} style={{display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"3px",padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:"6px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:"0.5px",color:s.c,backgroundColor:s.bg,fontFamily:T.mono,cursor:"pointer"}}>
      {s.i} {s.l}
    </span>
    {show && <div style={{position:"absolute",top:"100%",left:0,zIndex:50,marginTop:"6px",padding:"10px 12px",background:T.card,border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"8px",boxShadow:"0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)",width:"240px",fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,lineHeight:1.5}}>
      <strong style={{color:s.c}}>{s.l}</strong>: {STATUS_INFO[s.l]}
      <div style={{marginTop:"6px",fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted}}>Tap badge again to close</div>
    </div>}
  </span>;
}

// ── Risk Gauge ──
function RiskGauge({ pct, positions, acct }) {
  const [showTooltip, setShowTooltip] = useState(false);
  const clamp = Math.min(Math.max(pct, 0), 100);
  const angle = -90 + (clamp / 100) * 180;
  const color = pct > 30 ? T.red : pct > 15 ? T.orange : T.green;
  const label = pct > 30 ? "HIGH RISK" : pct > 15 ? "MODERATE" : "LOW RISK";

  // Sort positions by risk contribution, highest first
  const sorted = [...positions].map(pos => ({pos, c:calc(pos, acct)}))
    .sort((a, b) => b.c.riskPct - a.c.riskPct);

  return <>
    {/* Full-screen dismiss overlay */}
    {showTooltip && <div onClick={()=>setShowTooltip(false)}
      style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:55,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.25)"}}/>}

    <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"16px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,textAlign:"center",position:"relative"}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.8px",fontWeight:600,marginBottom:"8px"}}>Account Risk</div>
      <div onClick={()=>setShowTooltip(!showTooltip)} style={{cursor:"pointer"}}>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 200 120" style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:"200px"}}>
          <path d="M20 100 A80 80 0 0 1 180 100" fill="none" stroke="#e5e2dc" strokeWidth="12" strokeLinecap="round"/>
          <path d="M20 100 A80 80 0 0 1 60 38" fill="none" stroke={T.green} strokeWidth="12" strokeLinecap="round"/>
          <path d="M60 38 A80 80 0 0 1 140 38" fill="none" stroke={T.orange} strokeWidth="12" strokeLinecap="round"/>
          <path d="M140 38 A80 80 0 0 1 180 100" fill="none" stroke={T.red} strokeWidth="12" strokeLinecap="round"/>
          <line x1="100" y1="100" x2="100" y2="30" stroke={color} strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round" transform={`rotate(${angle} 100 100)`}/>
          <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="6" fill={color}/>
          <text x="100" y="88" textAnchor="middle" fontSize="22" fontWeight="700" fontFamily={T.mono} fill={T.text}>{pct.toFixed(1)}%</text>
        </svg>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,color,marginTop:"4px"}}>{label}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted,marginTop:"2px"}}>Tap for breakdown</div>
      </div>

      {showTooltip && <div
        onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}
        style={{position:"absolute",top:"calc(100% + 10px)",right:0,zIndex:60,background:T.card,
          border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"12px",
          boxShadow:"0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18)",padding:"16px",
          width:"290px",textAlign:"left"}}>

        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:700,color}}>{label}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,marginTop:"2px"}}>{pct.toFixed(1)}% of account at risk</div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowTooltip(false)}
            style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",color:T.muted,fontSize:"18px",padding:"0",lineHeight:1,marginLeft:"8px"}}>×</button>
        </div>

        {/* Per-position breakdown */}
        {sorted.length > 0 && <>
          <div style={{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:700,color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",
            letterSpacing:"0.8px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>Position Breakdown</div>
          {sorted.map(({pos, c}) => {
            const rowColor = c.riskPct > 8 ? T.red : c.riskPct > 4 ? T.orange : T.green;
            return <div key={pos.id} style={{marginBottom:"7px"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"baseline"}}>
                <span style={{fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:700,fontSize:"13px"}}>{pos.ticker}</span>
                <span style={{fontFamily:T.mono,fontSize:"12px",color:rowColor,fontWeight:700}}>{c.riskPct.toFixed(1)}% of acct</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:"11px",color:T.sub}}>
                <span>${pos.shortStrike}/{pos.longStrike} · {c.ct} ct{c.ct>1?"s":""}</span>
                <span>{fmt$(c.maxLoss)} max loss</span>
              </div>
              {/* Mini bar */}
              <div style={{marginTop:"3px",height:"3px",background:T.border,borderRadius:"2px",overflow:"hidden"}}>
                <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${Math.min(c.riskPct/40*100,100)}%`,background:rowColor,borderRadius:"2px"}}/>
              </div>
            </div>;
          })}
        </>}

        {/* Explanation */}
        <div style={{marginTop:"12px",padding:"10px",background:T.inpBg,borderRadius:"8px",
          fontSize:"11px",color:T.sub,lineHeight:1.6,borderTop:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
          This shows your total maximum loss if <strong>ALL</strong> positions hit max loss simultaneously.
          In practice this is unlikely — it would require every underlying stock to drop below both strikes at expiration.
          <div style={{marginTop:"6px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"2px"}}>
            <span>🟢 &lt;15% = conservative</span>
            <span>🟠 15–30% = moderate</span>
            <span>🔴 &gt;30% = aggressive</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  </>;
}

// ── Timeline ──
function Timeline({ positions }) {
  if (!positions.length) return null;
  const maxDays = Math.max(...positions.map(p=>daysTo(p.expiration)),30);
  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"14px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
    <div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:700,color:T.text,marginBottom:"12px"}}>Position Timeline</div>
    {positions.map(pos => {
      const c = calc(pos,0), days = c.days, pct = Math.min((days/maxDays)*100,100);
      const dangerStart = Math.max(0,((days-21)/maxDays)*100), expStart = Math.max(0,((days-7)/maxDays)*100);
      return <div key={pos.id} style={{marginBottom:"8px"}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"6px",marginBottom:"2px"}}>
          <div style={{minWidth:"70px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,lineHeight:1.2}}>{pos.ticker}</span>
            {pos.lastPrice && <span style={{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:600,fontFamily:T.mono,color:c.cush>=0?T.green:T.red,lineHeight:1.2}}>${pos.lastPrice.toFixed(2)}</span>}
          </div>
          <div style={{flex:1,position:"relative",height:"22px",background:"#f1f0ed",borderRadius:"4px",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",left:0,top:0,bottom:0,width:`${dangerStart}%`,background:`${T.green}18`}}/>
            {days>7&&<div style={{position:"absolute",left:`${dangerStart}%`,top:0,bottom:0,width:`${expStart-dangerStart}%`,background:`${T.orange}25`}}/>}
            <div style={{position:"absolute",left:`${expStart}%`,top:0,bottom:0,width:`${pct-expStart}%`,background:`${T.red}25`}}/>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",left:`${pct}%`,top:0,bottom:0,width:"2px",background:c.st.c}}/>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",left:"8px",fontSize:"10px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
              ${pos.shortStrike}/{pos.longStrike} · {fDate(pos.expiration)} · {days}d
            </div>
          </div>
          <Badge s={c.st}/>
        </div>
      </div>;
    })}
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"12px",marginTop:"6px",fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted}}>
      {[{c:`${T.green}30`,l:"Safe"},{c:`${T.orange}35`,l:"Danger (<21d)"},{c:`${T.red}35`,l:"Exp Week (<7d)"}].map(x=>
        <div key={x.l} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"4px"}}><div style={{width:"12px",height:"8px",borderRadius:"2px",background:x.c}}/>{x.l}</div>)}
    </div>
  </div>;
}

// ── Payoff Diagram ──
function PayoffDiagram({ pos, onClose }) {
  const c = calc(pos,0), credit = (pos.credit||0)*100*c.ct, maxL = c.maxLoss;
  const low = pos.longStrike-c.w, high = pos.shortStrike+c.w;
  const data = [];
  const isCall = pos.type === "call";
  for (let px = low; px <= high; px += 0.5) {
    let pnl;
    if (isCall) {
      // call spread: profit when stock stays BELOW short strike
      pnl = px <= pos.shortStrike ? credit : px >= pos.longStrike ? -maxL : credit-(px-pos.shortStrike)*100*c.ct;
    } else {
      pnl = px >= pos.shortStrike ? credit : px <= pos.longStrike ? -maxL : credit-(pos.shortStrike-px)*100*c.ct;
    }
    data.push({price:px, pnl, profit:pnl>0?pnl:0, loss:pnl<0?pnl:0});
  }
  return <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.35)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:100,padding:"16px"}} onClick={onClose}>
    <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"20px",width:"100%",maxWidth:"500px",boxShadow:"0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)"}} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
        <div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"17px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"8px"}}>
            {pos.ticker} Payoff <TypePill type={pos.type||"put"}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:"13px",color:T.sub}}>${pos.shortStrike}/${pos.longStrike} {pos.type==="call"?"call":"put"} credit spread</div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={onClose} style={{background:"none",border:"none",fontSize:"20px",cursor:"pointer",color:T.muted,padding:"8px"}}>✖</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:"12px",fontSize:"13px"}}>
        <span style={{color:T.green,fontWeight:700}}>Max Win: {fmt$(credit)}{!pos.credit && " (enter credit!)"}</span>
        <span style={{color:T.red,fontWeight:700}}>Max Loss: {fmt$(-maxL)}</span>
      </div>
      <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={200}>
        <AreaChart data={data} margin={{top:5,right:10,left:10,bottom:5}}>
          <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#e5e2dc"/>
          <XAxis dataKey="price" fontSize={11} fontFamily={T.mono} tickFormatter={v=>`$${v}`} stroke={T.muted}/>
          <YAxis fontSize={11} fontFamily={T.mono} tickFormatter={v=>fmt$(v)} stroke={T.muted}/>
          <RTooltip formatter={v=>[fmt$(Math.round(v)),"P&L"]} labelFormatter={v=>`Stock: $${v}`} contentStyle={{fontSize:"12px",fontFamily:T.mono,borderRadius:"8px"}}/>
          <ReferenceLine y={0} stroke={T.text} strokeWidth={1}/>
          <ReferenceLine x={pos.shortStrike} stroke={T.orange} strokeDasharray="4 4"/>
          <ReferenceLine x={pos.longStrike} stroke={T.accent} strokeDasharray="4 4"/>
          {pos.lastPrice&&<ReferenceLine x={pos.lastPrice} stroke={T.text} strokeWidth={2}/>}
          <Area type="stepAfter" dataKey="profit" fill="#16a34a30" stroke={T.green} strokeWidth={2}/>
          <Area type="stepAfter" dataKey="loss" fill="#dc262630" stroke={T.red} strokeWidth={2}/>
        </AreaChart>
      </ResponsiveContainer>
      <div style={{marginTop:"10px",fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,lineHeight:1.6}}>
        {pos.type==="call"
          ? `Below $${pos.shortStrike} = full profit. Above $${pos.longStrike} = max loss.`
          : `Above $${pos.shortStrike} = full profit. Below $${pos.longStrike} = max loss.`}
        {!pos.credit && <span style={{color:T.orange}}> Enter credit amount to see accurate profit.</span>}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>;
}

// ── Edit Modal ──
function EditModal({ pos, onSave, onCancel }) {
  const [f,setF] = useState({...pos}); const u = (k,v) => setF(p=>({...p,[k]:v}));
  return <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.35)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:100,padding:"16px"}} onClick={onCancel}>
    <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"16px",padding:"24px",width:"100%",maxWidth:"420px",boxShadow:"0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)"}} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>
      <h3 style={{margin:"0 0 16px",fontSize:"17px"}}>Edit {f.ticker}</h3>
      <div style={{marginBottom:"10px"}}>
        <label style={lbl}>Type</label>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0",border:`1px solid ${T.inpBrd}`,borderRadius:"6px",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {["put","call"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>u("type",t)}
            style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",border:"none",background:(f.type||"put")===t?(t==="call"?"#7c3aed":T.green):"transparent",
              color:(f.type||"put")===t?"#fff":T.sub,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>
            {t}
          </button>)}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Ticker</label><input value={f.ticker} onChange={e=>u("ticker",e.target.value.toUpperCase())} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Contracts</label><input type="number" value={f.contracts||1} onChange={e=>u("contracts",parseInt(e.target.value)||1)} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Short Strike</label><input type="number" value={f.shortStrike} onChange={e=>u("shortStrike",parseFloat(e.target.value)||0)} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Long Strike</label><input type="number" value={f.longStrike} onChange={e=>u("longStrike",parseFloat(e.target.value)||0)} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Expiration</label><input type="date" value={f.expiration||""} onChange={e=>u("expiration",e.target.value)} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Credit ($)</label><input type="number" step="0.01" value={f.credit||""} onChange={e=>u("credit",parseFloat(e.target.value)||null)} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Stock Price</label><input type="number" step="0.01" value={f.lastPrice||""} onChange={e=>u("lastPrice",parseFloat(e.target.value)||null)} style={inp()}/></div>
        <div><label style={lbl}>Notes</label><input value={f.notes||""} onChange={e=>u("notes",e.target.value)} style={inp()} placeholder="e.g. rolled from Mar"/></div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",justifyContent:"flex-end",marginTop:"16px"}}>
        <button onClick={onCancel} style={btnS("transparent",T.sub,`1px solid ${T.border}`)}>Cancel</button>
        <button onClick={()=>onSave(f)} style={btnS(T.accent,"#fff")}>Save</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>;
}

// ── Import ──
function ImportPanel({ positions, onAdd, onUpdate, onArchive, onClose }) {
  const [mode, setMode] = useState("quick"); // "sync" | "quick"
  const [text, setText] = useState("");
  const [parsed, setParsed] = useState([]);
  const [stale, setStale] = useState([]); // positions in app but not in paste (sync mode only)

  const updateP = (i, u) => setParsed(p => p.map((x, j) => j === i ? {...x, ...u} : x));

  const doParse = () => {
    let r = parseFidelityCSV(text);
    if (!r.length) r = parseFidelity(text);
    if (!r.length) r = parseOFIEmail(text);
    const enriched = r.map(t => {
      const match = positions.find(p =>
        p.ticker === t.ticker && p.shortStrike === t.shortStrike &&
        p.longStrike === t.longStrike && p.expiration === t.expiration
      );
      return {...t, existing: match ? match.id : null, contracts: match?.contracts||1,
        credit: match?.credit || t.credit || null, lastPrice: null, notes: match?.notes||""};
    });
    setParsed(enriched);
    if (mode === "sync") {
      // find positions in app that are NOT in the paste
      const foundIds = enriched.filter(t => t.existing).map(t => t.existing);
      setStale(positions.filter(p => !foundIds.includes(p.id)));
    } else {
      setStale([]);
    }
  };

  const confirmAll = () => {
    for (const t of parsed) {
      if (t.existing) onUpdate(t.existing, {lastPrice: t.lastPrice||undefined, credit: t.credit||undefined});
      else onAdd({ticker:t.ticker, shortStrike:t.shortStrike, longStrike:t.longStrike,
        expiration:t.expiration, credit:t.credit, contracts:t.contracts||1,
        lastPrice:t.lastPrice, notes:t.notes||""});
    }
    for (const p of stale.filter(s => s._archive)) onArchive(p.id);
    onClose();
  };

  const toggleStaleArchive = (id) => setStale(s => s.map(p => p.id===id ? {...p, _archive:!p._archive} : p));

  const newCount = parsed.filter(t => !t.existing).length;
  const updateCount = parsed.filter(t => t.existing).length;
  const archiveCount = stale.filter(s => s._archive).length;

  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"14px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:700}}>Import Positions</div>
      <button onClick={onClose} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",color:T.muted,fontSize:"18px"}}>✖</button>
    </div>

    {/* Mode Toggle */}
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0",marginBottom:"14px",borderRadius:"8px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {[["quick","⚡ Quick Add"],["sync","🔄 Weekly Sync"]].map(([m,l])=>
        <button key={m} onClick={()=>{setMode(m);setParsed([]);setStale([]);setText("");}}
          style={{flex:1,padding:"9px 12px",border:"none",fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",
            background:mode===m?T.accent:"transparent",color:mode===m?"#fff":T.sub,
            transition:"background 0.15s"}}>
          {l}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>

    {/* Mode instructions */}
    {mode==="sync" ? (
      <div style={{background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:"8px",padding:"12px",marginBottom:"12px",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,color:T.accent,marginBottom:"6px"}}>Wednesday Full Sync</div>
        {["1. Open Fidelity web → Positions page","2. Select All → Copy","3. Paste below"].map((s,i)=>
          <div key={i} style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#1e40af",padding:"2px 0"}}>{s}</div>
        )}
      </div>
    ) : (
      <div style={{fontSize:"13px",color:T.sub,marginBottom:"10px"}}>
        Paste a <strong>trade alert email</strong> or <strong>single position</strong> from Fidelity. Only adds new positions — never marks anything stale.
      </div>
    )}

    <textarea value={text} onChange={e=>setText(e.target.value)} rows={5}
      placeholder={mode==="sync" ? "Paste full Fidelity positions page here..." : "Paste trade alert or position here..."}
      style={{...inp("100%"),resize:"vertical",minHeight:"80px"}}/>
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",marginTop:"10px"}}>
      <button onClick={doParse} style={btnS(T.accent,"#fff")}>Parse</button>
      <button onClick={onClose} style={btnS("transparent",T.sub,`1px solid ${T.border}`)}>Cancel</button>
    </div>

    {/* Results */}
    {(parsed.length > 0 || stale.length > 0) && <div style={{marginTop:"16px"}}>

      {/* UPDATE rows */}
      {parsed.filter(t=>t.existing).length > 0 && <>
        <div style={{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:700,color:T.green,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.8px",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
          ✅ Update ({parsed.filter(t=>t.existing).length})
        </div>
        {parsed.filter(t=>t.existing).map((t,i)=>{
          const realIdx = parsed.indexOf(t);
          return <div key={i} style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:"8px",marginBottom:"6px",border:`1px solid ${T.green}30`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div>
              <span style={{fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,fontSize:"14px"}}>{t.ticker}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,marginLeft:"8px"}}>${t.shortStrike}/{t.longStrike} · {fDateFull(t.expiration)}</span>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:"11px",color:T.green,fontWeight:600}}>price + credit refreshed</span>
          </div>;
        })}
      </>}

      {/* NEW rows */}
      {parsed.filter(t=>!t.existing).length > 0 && <>
        <div style={{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:700,color:T.accent,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.8px",marginBottom:"6px",marginTop:"10px"}}>
          ➕ New ({parsed.filter(t=>!t.existing).length})
        </div>
        {parsed.filter(t=>!t.existing).map((t,i)=>{
          const realIdx = parsed.indexOf(t);
          return <div key={i} style={{padding:"12px",background:T.inpBg,borderRadius:"8px",marginBottom:"6px",border:`1px solid ${T.accent}30`}}>
            <div style={{marginBottom:"8px"}}>
              <span style={{fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,fontSize:"15px"}}>{t.ticker}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:"13px",color:T.sub,marginLeft:"8px"}}>${t.shortStrike}/{t.longStrike} · {fDateFull(t.expiration)}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"6px"}}>
              <div><label style={{...lbl,fontSize:"9px"}}>Credit ($)</label>
                <input type="number" step="0.01" value={t.credit||""} onChange={e=>updateP(realIdx,{credit:parseFloat(e.target.value)||null})} placeholder="—" style={{...inp(),fontSize:"13px",padding:"5px 7px"}}/></div>
              <div><label style={{...lbl,fontSize:"9px"}}>Stock Price</label>
                <input type="number" step="0.01" value={t.lastPrice||""} onChange={e=>updateP(realIdx,{lastPrice:parseFloat(e.target.value)||null})} placeholder="—" style={{...inp(),fontSize:"13px",padding:"5px 7px"}}/></div>
              <div><label style={{...lbl,fontSize:"9px"}}>Contracts</label>
                <input type="number" value={t.contracts||1} onChange={e=>updateP(realIdx,{contracts:parseInt(e.target.value)||1})} style={{...inp(),fontSize:"13px",padding:"5px 7px"}}/></div>
            </div>
          </div>;
        })}
      </>}

      {/* STALE rows — sync mode only */}
      {mode==="sync" && stale.length > 0 && <>
        <div style={{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:700,color:T.orange,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.8px",marginBottom:"6px",marginTop:"10px"}}>
          ⚠️ Stale — not found in paste ({stale.length})
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,marginBottom:"8px"}}>These positions are in the app but weren't in your Fidelity paste. Tap to mark for archiving.</div>
        {stale.map((p,i)=>{
          const c = calc(p, 0);
          return <div key={i} style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:p._archive?"#fff7ed":"#fffbeb",borderRadius:"8px",marginBottom:"6px",border:`1px solid ${p._archive?T.orange:T.orange+"40"}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div>
              <span style={{fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,fontSize:"14px",textDecoration:p._archive?"line-through":"none",color:p._archive?T.muted:T.text}}>{p.ticker}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,marginLeft:"8px"}}>${p.shortStrike}/{p.longStrike} · {fDate(p.expiration)}</span>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>toggleStaleArchive(p.id)}
              style={{padding:"5px 10px",borderRadius:"6px",border:`1px solid ${T.orange}`,background:p._archive?T.orange:"transparent",color:p._archive?"#fff":T.orange,fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>
              {p._archive?"↩️ Undo":"Archive"}
            </button>
          </div>;
        })}
      </>}

      {/* Confirm button */}
      {(parsed.length > 0 || archiveCount > 0) && <button onClick={confirmAll}
        style={{...btnS(T.green,"#fff"),width:"100%",marginTop:"12px",padding:"13px",fontSize:"14px"}}>
        Confirm All ({updateCount} update{updateCount!==1?"s":""}, {newCount} new{archiveCount>0?`, ${archiveCount} archived`:""})
      </button>}
    </div>}
  </div>;
}

// ── Prompts ──
function PromptsPanel() {
  const [copied,setCopied] = useState(null);
  const copy = (text,i) => {navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(()=>{setCopied(i);setTimeout(()=>setCopied(null),1500);});};
  const prompts = [
    {label:"Weekly check-in",text:"Check my OFI emails for new trade alerts this week",desc:"Thursday AM routine"},
    {label:"Update positions",text:"Here's my Fidelity screenshot — update my OFI positions and tell me what needs attention",desc:"Drop screenshot + this prompt"},
    {label:"Position advice",text:"What should I do about my [TICKER] position? It's showing [STATUS] in my tracker",desc:"Replace [TICKER] and [STATUS]"},
    {label:"Roll help",text:"Jim sent a roll alert for [TICKER]. Here's the email — walk me through executing this in Fidelity",desc:"Paste Jim's email after this"},
    {label:"Assignment help",text:"I got assigned on [TICKER]. What are my options?",desc:"For rare assignment situations"},
    {label:"Expiration check",text:"Review my OFI positions expiring this month. What needs my attention?",desc:"Around 3rd Friday"},
    {label:"P&L review",text:"How is my OFI options account doing overall? Review my open and closed positions.",desc:"Monthly review"},
    {label:"Build next version",text:"Let's improve the FinkWatch app. Here's what I want to change:",desc:"For app updates"},
  ];
  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"16px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
    <div style={{fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:700,marginBottom:"4px"}}>Claude Prompts</div>
    <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,marginBottom:"14px"}}>Tap any prompt to copy it. Paste into a Claude chat.</div>
    {prompts.map((p,i)=><div key={i} onClick={()=>copy(p.text,i)} style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:T.inpBg,borderRadius:"8px",marginBottom:"6px",cursor:"pointer",border:`1px solid ${copied===i?T.green:"transparent"}`,transition:"border-color 0.2s"}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
        <div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:600}}>{p.label}</div><div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub,marginTop:"2px"}}>{p.desc}</div></div>
        <span style={{fontSize:"12px",color:copied===i?T.green:T.accent,fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginLeft:"8px"}}>{copied===i?"Copied!":"Tap to copy"}</span>
      </div>
      <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontFamily:T.mono,color:T.muted,marginTop:"6px",padding:"6px 8px",background:T.card,borderRadius:"4px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>{p.text}</div>
    </div>)}
  </div>;
}

// ── Help ──
function HelpPanel() {
  const s = {marginBottom:"16px"}, h = {fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:700,marginBottom:"6px"}, p = {fontSize:"13px",color:T.sub,lineHeight:1.65,margin:"0 0 6px"};
  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"20px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
    <div style={s}>
      <div style={h}>📅 Weekly Workflow</div>
      <div style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,color:T.accent,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.6px",marginBottom:"5px"}}>Wednesday Evening — Weekly Sync</div>
        {["1. Open Fidelity web → Positions page → Select All → Copy","2. Open FinkWatch → Import → Weekly Sync → Paste → Confirm","3. Tap Fetch Prices to update stock prices","4. Review dashboard — act on anything orange or red"].map((step,i)=>
          <p key={i} style={{...p,margin:"0 0 3px",paddingLeft:"4px"}}>{step}</p>
        )}
      </div>
      <div style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,color:T.green,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.6px",marginBottom:"5px"}}>Thursday Morning — New Trades</div>
        <p style={p}>Jim posts 2 new trade alerts. Either Quick Add them now (Import → Quick Add → paste email), or wait until next Wednesday sync — they'll appear automatically from the Fidelity paste.</p>
      </div>
      <div style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,color:T.orange,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.6px",marginBottom:"5px"}}>3rd Friday — Expiration Day</div>
        <p style={p}>Positions expiring OTM (stock above short strike) expire worthless — that's the win. No action needed. Positions expiring ITM: Jim will have sent a roll alert earlier in the week.</p>
      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,color:T.accent,marginBottom:"4px"}}>💡 Why Wednesday, not Thursday?</div>
        <p style={{...p,margin:0,color:"#1e40af"}}>Jim's new trades drop Thursday AM. Syncing Wednesday means you start Thursday with a clean, verified dashboard — then add new trades on top of accurate data.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style={s}><div style={h}>⚠️ Status Colors (tap any badge for details)</div><p style={p}><strong style={{color:T.green}}>✅ OK</strong> — Safe, no action needed.</p><p style={p}><strong style={{color:T.orange}}>👀 TIGHT</strong> — Within 3% of short strike.</p><p style={p}><strong style={{color:T.orange}}>⚠️ DANGER</strong> — Under 21 days. Jim watching.</p><p style={p}><strong style={{color:T.red}}>🚨 EXP WEEK</strong> — Check daily!</p><p style={p}><strong style={{color:"#b45309"}}>⚠️ ITM</strong> — In the money. Roll coming.</p></div>
    <div style={s}><div style={h}>💰 Numbers</div><p style={p}><strong>Margin:</strong> Capital locked = spread width × 100 × contracts.</p><p style={p}><strong>Max Win:</strong> Credit × 100 × contracts. <em>Shows $0 until you enter the credit amount.</em></p><p style={p}><strong>Max Loss:</strong> Margin minus credit.</p></div>
    <div style={s}><div style={h}>🔄 Rolls & 💳 Assignment</div><p style={p}><strong>Roll:</strong> Close current spread, open new one. Execute ASAP.</p><p style={p}><strong>Assignment:</strong> Rare. Ask Claude for help.</p></div>
    <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:T.inpBg,borderRadius:"8px",fontSize:"12px",color:T.sub}}><strong>Tip:</strong> Screenshot Fidelity positions and send to Claude. Claude reads the screenshot and advises you.</div>
  </div>;
}

// ── Position Card ──
function PosCard({pos,acct,onUpdate,onEdit,onRemove,onPayoff}) {
  const c = calc(pos,acct), d3 = wk3b(pos.expiration), em = expMon(pos.expiration);
  const noCredit = !pos.credit;
  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"10px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)"}}>
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
      <div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"8px",flexWrap:"wrap"}}><span style={{fontSize:"18px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono}}>{pos.ticker}</span><Badge s={c.st}/></div>
        <div style={{fontSize:"13px",color:T.sub,marginTop:"4px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"6px",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          <TypePill type={pos.type||"put"}/>
          <span>${pos.shortStrike}/{pos.longStrike} · {c.ct} ct{c.ct>1?"s":""}</span>
          {pos.notes&&<span style={{color:T.muted,fontStyle:"italic"}}>— {pos.notes}</span>}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"2px"}}><button onClick={()=>onPayoff(pos)} title="Payoff diagram" style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"18px",padding:"6px"}}>📈</button><button onClick={()=>onEdit(pos)} title="Edit" style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"18px",padding:"6px"}}>✏️</button><button onClick={()=>onRemove(pos.id)} title="Close" style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"16px",padding:"6px",color:T.muted}}>✖</button></div>
    </div>
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Expires</div><div style={{fontSize:"14px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:c.days<=21?c.st.c:T.text}}>{fDate(pos.expiration)}</div><div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:c.days<=21?c.st.c:T.muted}}>{c.days}d left</div></div>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Stock $ <span style={{fontSize:"8px"}}>(manual)</span></div><input type="number" step="0.01" value={c.px||""} onChange={e=>onUpdate(pos.id,{lastPrice:parseFloat(e.target.value)||null})} placeholder="enter" style={{...inp("85px"),padding:"4px 7px",fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:600}}/></div>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Cushion</div><div style={{fontSize:"14px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:c.cush===null?T.muted:c.cush>=0?T.green:T.red}}>{c.cush!==null?`$${c.cush.toFixed(1)}`:"—"}</div>{c.cushPct!==null&&<div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:c.cushPct>=3?T.green:c.cushPct>=0?T.orange:T.red}}>{c.cushPct.toFixed(1)}%</div>}</div>
    </div>
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"8px",padding:"10px 0",borderTop:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Margin</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600}}>{fmt$(c.margin)}</div></div>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Max Win</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:c.maxWin>0?T.green:T.muted}}>{noCredit ? <span style={{fontSize:"11px",color:T.orange}}>enter via ✏️</span> : fmt$(c.maxWin)}</div>{!noCredit && c.returnPct>0&&<div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:T.green}}>{c.returnPct.toFixed(0)}% ret</div>}</div>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Max Loss</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:T.red}}>{fmt$(c.maxLoss)}</div><div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:c.riskPct>8?T.red:c.riskPct>5?T.orange:T.muted}}>{c.riskPct.toFixed(1)}% acct</div></div>
      <div><div style={metaLbl}>Credit</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:pos.credit?T.green:T.orange}}>{pos.credit?`$${pos.credit.toFixed(2)}`:<span style={{fontSize:"11px"}}>enter via ✏️</span>}</div></div>
    </div>
    {pos.expiration&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:"6px",flexWrap:"wrap",marginTop:"8px"}}>
      <a href={gcal(`⚠️ OFI: ${pos.ticker} Danger Zone`,`${pos.ticker} $${pos.shortStrike}/$${pos.longStrike} expires ${fDateFull(pos.expiration)}.\nMax loss: ${fmt$(c.maxLoss)}.`,d3)} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{fontSize:"11px",textDecoration:"none",padding:"5px 10px",borderRadius:"6px",display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"4px",color:T.orange,border:`1px solid ${T.orange}30`,background:`${T.orange}08`}}>
        📅 Add Danger Zone to Google Calendar
      </a>
      <a href={gcal(`🚨 OFI: ${pos.ticker} Expiration Week`,`${pos.ticker} $${pos.shortStrike}/$${pos.longStrike} expires THIS FRIDAY.\nCheck Jim's alerts DAILY.`,em)} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{fontSize:"11px",textDecoration:"none",padding:"5px 10px",borderRadius:"6px",display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"4px",color:T.red,border:`1px solid ${T.red}30`,background:`${T.red}08`}}>
        📅 Add Exp Week to Google Calendar
      </a>
    </div>}
  </div>;
}

// ── Compact Card ──
function CompactCard({pos, acct, onEdit, onRemove, onPayoff, onUpdate}) {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false);
  const c = calc(pos, acct);
  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"10px",marginBottom:"6px",border:`1px solid ${c.st.l==="OK"?T.border:c.st.c+"50"}`,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)"}}>
    {/* Compact row */}
    <div onClick={()=>setExpanded(e=>!e)} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"8px",padding:"10px 12px",cursor:"pointer"}}>
      {/* Left: ticker + badge */}
      <div style={{minWidth:"90px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"6px",flexShrink:0}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono}}>{pos.ticker}</span>
        <Badge s={c.st}/>
      </div>
      {/* Middle: spread · expiry · cushion */}
      <div style={{flex:1,fontSize:"11px",color:T.sub,fontFamily:T.mono,minWidth:0}}>
        <div style={{fontWeight:600,color:T.text,whiteSpace:"nowrap",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis"}}>
          ${pos.shortStrike}/{pos.longStrike} · {fDate(pos.expiration)}
        </div>
        <div style={{marginTop:"1px"}}>
          {c.cush!==null
            ? <span style={{color:c.cush>=0?T.green:T.red,fontWeight:700}}>${c.cush.toFixed(1)} cushion ({c.cushPct.toFixed(1)}%)</span>
            : <span style={{color:T.muted}}>no price entered</span>}
        </div>
      </div>
      {/* Right: max loss + days */}
      <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,color:T.red}}>{fmt$(c.maxLoss)}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:c.days<=21?c.st.c:T.muted,fontWeight:c.days<=21?700:400}}>{c.days}d left</div>
      </div>
      {/* Chevron */}
      <div style={{color:T.muted,fontSize:"12px",flexShrink:0,marginLeft:"2px"}}>{expanded?"▲":"▼"}</div>
    </div>
    {/* Expanded: full card content inline */}
    {expanded && <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${T.border}`,padding:"12px",background:T.inpBg}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
        <div><div style={metaLbl}>Stock $ <span style={{fontSize:"8px"}}>(manual)</span></div>
          <input type="number" step="0.01" value={c.px||""} onChange={e=>onUpdate(pos.id,{lastPrice:parseFloat(e.target.value)||null})}
            placeholder="enter" style={{...inp("85px"),padding:"4px 7px",fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:600}}/></div>
        <div><div style={metaLbl}>Margin</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600}}>{fmt$(c.margin)}</div></div>
        <div><div style={metaLbl}>Max Win</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:c.maxWin>0?T.green:T.muted}}>{!pos.credit?<span style={{fontSize:"11px",color:T.orange}}>enter ✏️</span>:fmt$(c.maxWin)}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
        <div><div style={metaLbl}>Credit</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:pos.credit?T.green:T.orange}}>{pos.credit?`$${pos.credit.toFixed(2)}`:"enter ✏️"}</div></div>
        <div><div style={metaLbl}>Risk</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",fontFamily:T.mono,fontWeight:600,color:c.riskPct>8?T.red:c.riskPct>5?T.orange:T.muted}}>{c.riskPct.toFixed(1)}% acct</div></div>
      </div>
      {pos.notes&&<div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.muted,fontStyle:"italic",marginBottom:"8px"}}>— {pos.notes}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"6px",justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>
        <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();onPayoff(pos);}} style={{background:"none",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"6px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"14px",padding:"5px 10px"}}>📈</button>
        <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();onEdit(pos);}} style={{background:"none",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"6px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"14px",padding:"5px 10px"}}>✏️</button>
        <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();onRemove(pos.id);}} style={{background:"none",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"6px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"13px",padding:"5px 10px",color:T.muted}}>✖</button>
      </div>
    </div>}
  </div>;
}

// ── Table View ──
function TableView({positions, acct, onUpdate, onEdit, onRemove, onPayoff}) {
  const cols = ["Ticker","Spread","Expires","Days","Stock $","Cushion","Margin","Max Win","Max Loss","Credit","Status"];
  return <div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,overflow:"auto",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
    <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:"12px",fontFamily:T.mono}}>
      <thead>
        <tr style={{borderBottom:`2px solid ${T.border}`,background:T.inpBg}}>
          {cols.map(c=><th key={c} style={{padding:"8px 10px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.6px",fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c}</th>)}
          <th style={{padding:"8px 10px"}}></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {positions.map((pos,i)=>{
          const c = calc(pos,acct);
          return <tr key={pos.id} style={{borderBottom:`1px solid ${T.border}`,background:i%2===0?"transparent":T.inpBg+"80"}}>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"13px"}}>{pos.ticker}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>${pos.shortStrike}/{pos.longStrike}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{fDate(pos.expiration)}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",color:c.days<=21?c.st.c:T.text,fontWeight:c.days<=21?700:400}}>{c.days}d</td>
            <td style={{padding:"6px 8px"}}>
              <input type="number" step="0.01" value={pos.lastPrice||""} onChange={e=>onUpdate(pos.id,{lastPrice:parseFloat(e.target.value)||null})}
                placeholder="—" style={{...inp("70px"),padding:"3px 6px",fontSize:"12px"}}/>
            </td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",color:c.cush===null?T.muted:c.cush>=0?T.green:T.red,fontWeight:600}}>
              {c.cush!==null?`$${c.cush.toFixed(1)}`:"—"}{c.cushPct!==null&&<span style={{fontSize:"10px",display:"block"}}>{c.cushPct.toFixed(1)}%</span>}
            </td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{fmt$(c.margin)}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",color:c.maxWin>0?T.green:T.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{!pos.credit?<span style={{color:T.orange,fontSize:"10px"}}>enter ✏️</span>:fmt$(c.maxWin)}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",color:T.red,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{fmt$(c.maxLoss)}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 10px",color:pos.credit?T.green:T.orange}}>{pos.credit?`$${pos.credit.toFixed(2)}`:"—"}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"8px 6px"}}><Badge s={c.st}/></td>
            <td style={{padding:"6px 4px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
              <button onClick={()=>onPayoff(pos)} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"15px",padding:"3px"}}>📈</button>
              <button onClick={()=>onEdit(pos)} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"15px",padding:"3px"}}>✏️</button>
              <button onClick={()=>onRemove(pos.id)} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"13px",padding:"3px",color:T.muted}}>✖</button>
            </td>
          </tr>;
        })}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>;
}

// ── Main ──
export default function App() {
  const [positions,setPos] = useState([]); const [acct,setAcct] = useState(20520);
  const [closed,setClosed] = useState([]); const [view,setView] = useState("card");
  const [tab,setTab] = useState("positions"); const [showImport,setShowImport] = useState(false);
  const [showManual,setShowManual] = useState(false); const [editing,setEditing] = useState(null);
  const [payoff,setPayoff] = useState(null); const [loaded,setLoaded] = useState(false);
  const [backupMsg,setBackupMsg] = useState(null);
  const [fetchingPrices,setFetchingPrices] = useState(false);
  const [priceMsg,setPriceMsg] = useState(null);
  const [nf,setNf] = useState({ticker:"",shortStrike:"",longStrike:"",expiration:"",credit:"",contracts:"1",type:"put"});

  const FINNHUB_KEY = import.meta.env.VITE_FINNHUB_KEY;

  const fetchPrices = async (posArr, setter) => {
    if (!posArr.length) return;
    if (FINNHUB_KEY === "YOUR_FINNHUB_KEY_HERE") {
      setPriceMsg("⚠️ Add your Finnhub API key to enable price fetching");
      setTimeout(()=>setPriceMsg(null), 4000);
      return;
    }
    setFetchingPrices(true); setPriceMsg(null);
    const tickers = [...new Set(posArr.map(p=>p.ticker))];
    try {
      // Fetch all tickers in parallel
      const results = await Promise.all(
        tickers.map(ticker =>
          fetch(`https://finnhub.io/api/v1/quote?symbol=${ticker}&token=${FINNHUB_KEY}`)
            .then(r => r.json())
            .then(d => ({ ticker, price: d.c || null })) // d.c = current price
            .catch(() => ({ ticker, price: null }))
        )
      );
      const prices = {};
      for (const { ticker, price } of results) {
        if (price && price > 0) prices[ticker] = price;
      }
      const n = Object.keys(prices).length;
      if (n > 0) {
        setter(prev => prev.map(p => prices[p.ticker] != null ? {...p, lastPrice: prices[p.ticker]} : p));
        setPriceMsg(`✅ Updated ${n} price${n>1?"s":""}`);
      } else {
        setPriceMsg("⚠️ No prices returned — check API key");
      }
    } catch(e) {
      setPriceMsg("⚠️ Fetch failed — check connection");
    }
    setFetchingPrices(false);
    setTimeout(()=>setPriceMsg(null), 3500);
  };

  const DEFAULT_POSITIONS = [
    {id:"default1",ticker:"AMT",shortStrike:175,longStrike:170,expiration:"2026-04-17",credit:1.98,contracts:1,lastPrice:null,notes:"",type:"put"},
    {id:"default2",ticker:"CEG",shortStrike:290,longStrike:280,expiration:"2026-05-15",credit:3.43,contracts:1,lastPrice:null,notes:"",type:"put"},
    {id:"default3",ticker:"NVDA",shortStrike:170,longStrike:165,expiration:"2026-05-15",credit:1.69,contracts:1,lastPrice:null,notes:"",type:"put"},
    {id:"default4",ticker:"AJG",shortStrike:230,longStrike:210,expiration:"2026-07-17",credit:10.79,contracts:1,lastPrice:null,notes:"",type:"put"},
  ];

  useEffect(()=>{
    try{const r=localStorage.getItem(K.pos);if(r){const p=JSON.parse(r);setPos(p.length?p:DEFAULT_POSITIONS);}else{setPos(DEFAULT_POSITIONS);}}catch{setPos(DEFAULT_POSITIONS);}
    try{const r=localStorage.getItem(K.acct);if(r)setAcct(parseFloat(r));}catch{}
    try{const r=localStorage.getItem(K.hist);if(r)setClosed(JSON.parse(r));}catch{}
    try{const r=localStorage.getItem(K.view);if(r)setView(r);}catch{}
    try{const r=localStorage.getItem(K.tab);if(r)setTab(r);}catch{}
    setLoaded(true);
  },[]);

  // Auto-archive positions expired more than 3 days ago
  useEffect(()=>{
    if (!loaded) return;
    const stale = positions.filter(p => daysTo(p.expiration) < -3);
    if (!stale.length) return;
    const now = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
    setClosed(prev => [...prev, ...stale.map(p => ({...p, closedDate: p.expiration, notes: (p.notes ? p.notes + " · " : "") + "auto-archived (expired)"}))]);
    setPos(prev => prev.filter(p => !stale.find(s => s.id === p.id)));
    setBackupMsg(`${stale.length} expired position${stale.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} auto-archived`);
    setTimeout(() => setBackupMsg(null), 4000);
  }, [loaded]);

  useEffect(()=>{if(loaded)localStorage.setItem(K.pos,JSON.stringify(positions));},[positions,loaded]);
  useEffect(()=>{if(loaded)localStorage.setItem(K.acct,acct.toString());},[acct,loaded]);
  useEffect(()=>{if(loaded)localStorage.setItem(K.hist,JSON.stringify(closed));},[closed,loaded]);
  useEffect(()=>{if(loaded)localStorage.setItem(K.view,view);},[view,loaded]);
  useEffect(()=>{if(loaded)localStorage.setItem(K.tab,tab);},[tab,loaded]);

  const upd = useCallback((id,u)=>setPos(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===id?{...x,...u}:x)),[]);
  const rm = useCallback((id)=>{const p=positions.find(x=>x.id===id);if(p&&confirm(`Close ${p.ticker} $${p.shortStrike}/$${p.longStrike}?`)){setClosed(prev=>[...prev,{...p,closedDate:new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]}]);setPos(prev=>prev.filter(x=>x.id!==id));}},[positions]);
  const add = useCallback((p)=>setPos(prev=>[...prev,{...p,id:gid()}]),[]);
  const archive = useCallback((id)=>{const p=positions.find(x=>x.id===id);if(p){setClosed(prev=>[...prev,{...p,closedDate:new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]}]);setPos(prev=>prev.filter(x=>x.id!==id));}},[positions]);
  const saveEdit = (f) => {setPos(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===f.id?f:x));setEditing(null);};

  // Fix 5: clipboard backup instead of file download
  const doExport = () => {
    const data = JSON.stringify({positions,closed,accountValue:acct,exportDate:new Date().toISOString()},null,2);
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(data).then(()=>{
      setBackupMsg("Copied to clipboard!");
      setTimeout(()=>setBackupMsg(null),2500);
    }).catch(()=>{
      setBackupMsg("Copy failed — try again");
      setTimeout(()=>setBackupMsg(null),2500);
    });
  };

  const doManualAdd = () => {
    if(!nf.ticker||!nf.shortStrike||!nf.longStrike||!nf.expiration) return;
    add({ticker:nf.ticker.toUpperCase(),shortStrike:parseFloat(nf.shortStrike),longStrike:parseFloat(nf.longStrike),expiration:nf.expiration,credit:parseFloat(nf.credit)||null,contracts:parseInt(nf.contracts)||1,lastPrice:null,notes:"",type:nf.type||"put"});
    setNf({ticker:"",shortStrike:"",longStrike:"",expiration:"",credit:"",contracts:"1",type:"put"}); setShowManual(false);
  };

  const sorted = [...positions].sort((a,b)=>daysTo(a.expiration)-daysTo(b.expiration));
  const totMargin = positions.reduce((s,p)=>s+Math.abs(p.shortStrike-p.longStrike)*100*(p.contracts||1),0);
  const totMaxWin = positions.reduce((s,p)=>s+(p.credit||0)*100*(p.contracts||1),0);
  const totMaxLoss = totMargin-totMaxWin;
  const totRisk = acct>0?(totMaxLoss/acct*100):0;
  const urgent = positions.filter(p=>{const d=daysTo(p.expiration);return d<=21&&d>0;}).length;

  if (!loaded) return <div style={{background:T.bg,height:"100vh",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",color:T.muted,fontFamily:T.sans}}>Loading...</div>;

  // Health color driven by worst status across all open positions
  const healthColor = (() => {
    if (!positions.length) return T.green;
    const statuses = positions.map(p => calc(p, acct).st.l);
    if (statuses.includes("ITM") || statuses.includes("EXP WEEK")) return T.red;
    if (statuses.includes("DANGER") || statuses.includes("TIGHT")) return T.orange;
    return T.green;
  })();

  return <div style={{background:T.bg,minHeight:"100vh",color:T.text,fontFamily:T.sans,
    padding:"16px",maxWidth:"800px",margin:"0 auto",boxSizing:"border-box",
    borderLeft:`3px solid ${healthColor}60`,borderRight:`3px solid ${healthColor}60`,
    boxShadow:`inset 4px 0 16px ${healthColor}14, inset -4px 0 16px ${healthColor}14`}}>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    {/* Thin health accent bar pinned to top */}
    <div style={{height:"3px",background:`linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, ${healthColor}, transparent)`,
      marginLeft:"-16px",marginRight:"-16px",marginTop:"-16px",marginBottom:"16px",opacity:0.85}}/>
    {editing&&<EditModal pos={editing} onSave={saveEdit} onCancel={()=>setEditing(null)}/>}
    {payoff&&<PayoffDiagram pos={payoff} onClose={()=>setPayoff(null)}/>}

    {/* Backup toast */}
    {backupMsg && <div style={{position:"fixed",top:"16px",left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",zIndex:200,background:"#1f2937",color:"#fff",padding:"10px 20px",borderRadius:"8px",fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)"}}>{backupMsg}</div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"10px"}}>
        <img
          src={AVATAR} alt="Jim Fink"
          style={{width:"36px",height:"36px",borderRadius:"50%",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,flexShrink:0}}
        />
        <div><h1 style={{fontSize:"22px",fontWeight:700,margin:0,letterSpacing:"-0.5px"}}>FinkWatch</h1><div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:T.muted}}>Jim Fink · Put Credit Spreads</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"1px"}}>Account</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"2px",justifyContent:"flex-end"}}><span style={{color:T.muted}}>$</span><input type="number" value={acct} onChange={e=>setAcct(parseFloat(e.target.value)||0)} style={{width:"95px",background:"transparent",border:"none",borderBottom:`1px solid ${T.border}`,color:T.text,fontSize:"20px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,textAlign:"right"}}/></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Summary + Risk Gauge */}
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 180px",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"8px"}}>
        {[{l:"Margin",v:fmt$(totMargin),c:T.text},{l:"Max Win",v:fmt$(totMaxWin),c:T.green},{l:"Max Loss",v:fmt$(totMaxLoss),c:T.red,s:`${totRisk.toFixed(1)}% acct`},{l:"Attention",v:urgent,c:urgent>0?T.orange:T.green}].map((x,i)=>
          <div key={i} style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"10px",padding:"10px 12px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"0.6px",fontWeight:600}}>{x.l}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:"18px",fontWeight:700,fontFamily:T.mono,color:x.c}}>{x.v}</div>
            {x.s&&<div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:totRisk>20?T.red:T.muted}}>{x.s}</div>}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <RiskGauge pct={totRisk} positions={positions} acct={acct}/>
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0",marginBottom:"14px",background:T.card,borderRadius:"10px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {[{k:"positions",l:"Positions",i:"📊"},{k:"prompts",l:"Prompts",i:"💬"},{k:"help",l:"Help",i:"❓"}].map(t=>
        <button key={t.k} onClick={()=>setTab(t.k)} style={{flex:1,padding:"11px 8px",border:"none",borderBottom:tab===t.k?`3px solid ${T.accent}`:"3px solid transparent",background:tab===t.k?`${T.accent}08`:"transparent",color:tab===t.k?T.accent:T.sub,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:600}}>{t.i} {t.l}</button>
      )}
    </div>

    {tab==="positions"&&<>
      {sorted.length>0&&<Timeline positions={sorted}/>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"6px",marginBottom:"14px",flexWrap:"wrap",alignItems:"center"}}>
        <button onClick={()=>{setShowImport(!showImport);setShowManual(false);}} style={btnS(showImport?"#dbeafe":T.card,T.accent,`1px solid ${T.accent}30`)}>📋 Import</button>
        <button onClick={()=>{setShowManual(!showManual);setShowImport(false);}} style={btnS(showManual?"#dcfce7":T.card,T.green,`1px solid ${T.green}30`)}>+ Manual</button>
        <button onClick={doExport} style={btnS(T.card,"#6366f1","1px solid #6366f130")}>💾 Backup</button>
        <button onClick={()=>fetchPrices(positions,setPos)} disabled={fetchingPrices} style={{...btnS(T.card,"#0891b2","1px solid #0891b230"),opacity:fetchingPrices?0.6:1}}>
          {fetchingPrices?"⏳ Fetching...":"🔄 Fetch Prices"}
        </button>
        {priceMsg&&<span style={{fontSize:"12px",color:priceMsg.startsWith("✅")?T.green:T.orange,fontWeight:600}}>{priceMsg}</span>}
        <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",display:"flex",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"8px",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {[["card","Full"],["compact","Compact"],["table","Table"]].map(([v,l])=><button key={v} onClick={()=>setView(v)} style={{padding:"8px 12px",border:"none",background:view===v?T.accent:T.card,color:view===v?"#fff":T.sub,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:600}}>{l}</button>)}
        </div>
      </div>
      {showImport&&<ImportPanel positions={positions} onAdd={add} onUpdate={upd} onArchive={archive} onClose={()=>setShowImport(false)}/>}
      {showManual&&<div style={{background:T.card,borderRadius:"12px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"14px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}>
        <div style={{marginBottom:"8px"}}>
          <label style={lbl}>Type</label>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"0",border:`1px solid ${T.inpBrd}`,borderRadius:"6px",overflow:"hidden",width:"140px"}}>
            {["put","call"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>setNf({...nf,type:t})}
              style={{flex:1,padding:"7px",border:"none",background:(nf.type||"put")===t?(t==="call"?"#7c3aed":T.green):"transparent",
                color:(nf.type||"put")===t?"#fff":T.sub,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>
              {t}
            </button>)}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
          <div><label style={lbl}>Ticker</label><input value={nf.ticker} onChange={e=>setNf({...nf,ticker:e.target.value})} placeholder="CEG" style={inp()}/></div>
          <div><label style={lbl}>Short Strike</label><input type="number" value={nf.shortStrike} onChange={e=>setNf({...nf,shortStrike:e.target.value})} placeholder="290" style={inp()}/></div>
          <div><label style={lbl}>Long Strike</label><input type="number" value={nf.longStrike} onChange={e=>setNf({...nf,longStrike:e.target.value})} placeholder="280" style={inp()}/></div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
          <div><label style={lbl}>Expiration</label><input type="date" value={nf.expiration} onChange={e=>setNf({...nf,expiration:e.target.value})} style={inp()}/></div>
          <div><label style={lbl}>Credit ($)</label><input type="number" step="0.01" value={nf.credit} onChange={e=>setNf({...nf,credit:e.target.value})} placeholder="1.40" style={inp()}/></div>
          <div><label style={lbl}>Contracts</label><input type="number" value={nf.contracts} onChange={e=>setNf({...nf,contracts:e.target.value})} placeholder="1" style={inp()}/></div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px"}}><button onClick={doManualAdd} style={btnS(T.green,"#fff")}>Add Position</button><button onClick={()=>setShowManual(false)} style={btnS("transparent",T.sub,`1px solid ${T.border}`)}>Cancel</button></div>
      </div>}
      {sorted.length===0?<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"48px 20px",color:T.muted,border:`2px dashed ${T.border}`,borderRadius:"12px",background:T.card}}><div style={{fontSize:"32px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>📊</div><div style={{fontSize:"15px",fontWeight:600}}>No positions yet</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",marginTop:"6px"}}>Import from Fidelity or add manually</div></div>
        :view==="table"
          ? <TableView positions={sorted} acct={acct} onUpdate={upd} onEdit={setEditing} onRemove={rm} onPayoff={setPayoff}/>
          : view==="compact"
          ? sorted.map(p=><CompactCard key={p.id} pos={p} acct={acct} onUpdate={upd} onEdit={setEditing} onRemove={rm} onPayoff={setPayoff}/>)
          : sorted.map(p=><PosCard key={p.id} pos={p} acct={acct} onUpdate={upd} onEdit={setEditing} onRemove={rm} onPayoff={setPayoff}/>)}
      {closed.length>0&&<div style={{marginTop:"20px"}}><div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:T.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:"1px",marginBottom:"6px",fontWeight:600}}>Closed ({closed.length})</div>
        {closed.slice(-5).reverse().map((t,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"8px 12px",background:T.card,borderRadius:"8px",marginBottom:"3px",fontSize:"13px",border:`1px solid ${T.border}`}}><span style={{fontFamily:T.mono,color:T.sub}}>{t.ticker} ${t.shortStrike}/${t.longStrike}</span><span style={{color:T.muted}}>closed {t.closedDate}</span></div>)}</div>}
    </>}
    {tab==="prompts"&&<PromptsPanel/>}
    {tab==="help"&&<HelpPanel/>}
    <div style={{marginTop:"28px",padding:"10px 0",borderTop:`1px solid ${T.border}`,fontSize:"11px",color:T.muted,textAlign:"center"}}>📈 = payoff diagram · 📅 = add to Google Calendar · 💾 = backup data · Tap status badges for explanations</div>
  </div>;
}
